codeReview.summary: Implementation of ContractNegotiator and SprintContract is complete and correct. The feature fully satisfies VAL-OBS-011 with all expected behavior covered: SprintContract includes success_criteria (from task description, plan steps, and evaluator requirements), validation_gates (from evaluator or defaults to Lint+Test), and acceptance_threshold. The evaluate() method correctly enforces contract terms with proper threshold comparison. 12 unit tests and 10 integration tests pass. Clippy clean.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker reported a pre-existing unused_mut warning in recovery_recipe.rs line 995 that was not introduced by this change. This is documented as 'discoveredIssues' in the handoff but the issue was not fixed as it is pre-existing and out of scope for this feature.

summary: obs-sprint-contracts implementation passes review. ContractNegotiator and SprintContract are properly implemented with all required fields (success_criteria, validation_gates, acceptance_threshold). The evaluate() method correctly determines ContractStatus based on gate results and acceptance threshold. 22 tests pass (12 unit + 10 integration), clippy clean. Skill procedure followed correctly with no deviations.
